violations.text: Establishment does not have employee(s) certified in food safety management onsite during all hours of operation. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. Once completed, one employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Spray bottle used to store chemicals observed not labeled with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles with chemicals must always be labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
